title: Why Britain deliberately destroyed its manufacturing industry [video]
abstract: Why did Britain deliberately destroy its manufacturing industry? This video reveals the truth: it was to make way for America and Germany! Join us as we laugh at this move. Guaranteed to leave you in stitches!
abstract_zh: 你是不是也好奇，为什么英国明明有制造能力，却偏偏要亲手毁掉自己的制造业？这个视频告诉你真相：原来是为了给美国和德国腾地方！快来一起吐槽这波操作吧～保证让你笑到肚子疼！
